comment: The app is fine, the new interface isn't too bad, very simple and easy to operate. Although, something that should be added is offline definitions for words. A very little amount of words have this feature, but that shows that it works. Nothing complicated, just a the definition of the word. If you can do that and would I would be very satisfied and give 5 stars
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
